last_run.summary: Completed v4.9 tooling repairs and stopped before real L2/L3 execution. Runner now expands N2 ablations, generated ablation configs are non-no-op, GAM-COMA has a non-attention critic fallback, strict result collection and multi-metric statistics are implemented, and focused/full tests pass. Real L2/L3 formal claims are blocked by the pre-existing dirty frozen-core file and CPU-only heavy-run resource profile.
